chara_karakas.description: 7 variable significators based on planetary degrees
chara_karakas.calculation: Planets ordered by highest to lowest degree in natal chart

Atmakaraka (AK).importance: Most important planet in Jaimini system

DK_in_houses.1: Spouse significantly impacts self-identity; partner is very independent
DK_in_houses.2: Spouse brings wealth or family connections; emphasis on family values
DK_in_houses.3: Spouse is courageous, communicative, possibly younger sibling-like
DK_in_houses.4: Spouse provides emotional security; strong domestic focus
DK_in_houses.5: Spouse is creative, romantic, or connected to children/intelligence
DK_in_houses.6: Challenging placement - spouse may bring obstacles or health issues
DK_in_houses.7: Excellent for marriage - spouse is true partner; strong relationship
DK_in_houses.8: Transformation through marriage; intense but potentially difficult
DK_in_houses.9: Spouse brings fortune, wisdom, or foreign connections; dharma alignment
DK_in_houses.10: Spouse influences career or is career-oriented; public marriage
DK_in_houses.11: Spouse brings gains, fulfillment of desires; good financial partnership
DK_in_houses.12: Spouse may be from foreign land or spiritual; possible separation themes

DK_planet_nature.Moon: Nurturing, emotional, motherly/fatherly spouse; changeable nature
DK_planet_nature.Mars: Active, energetic, possibly military/athletic spouse; assertive
DK_planet_nature.Jupiter: Wise, spiritual, teacher/guide spouse; expansive and generous
DK_planet_nature.Saturn: Mature, older, serious, hardworking spouse; delayed marriage
DK_planet_nature.Rahu: Foreign, unconventional, ambitious spouse; sudden changes
DK_planet_nature.Ketu: Spiritual, detached, mystical spouse; past-life connection

chara_dasha.description: Jaimini sign-based timing system for events

calculation_rules.direct_movement: Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius - forward through zodiac
calculation_rules.reverse_movement: Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Capricorn, Aquarius, Pisces - backward through zodiac

dasha_periods.description: Each sign period determined by placement of its lord
dasha_periods.calculation: Count from sign to its lord, then count same distance forward
dasha_periods.example: If Aries lord Mars is in Cancer (4th from Aries), count 4 from Cancer = Libra gets 10 years

favorable_dashas.description: Dasha of sign holding Darakaraka brings marriage
Activation of 7th from DK is marriage timing
Dasha of Upapada Lagna sign activates marriage
7th from UL also indicates marriage period

marriage_timing.antardasha_importance: Sub-periods refine timing - look for overlap of marriage indicators

upapada_lagna.description: Special ascendant for marriage and spouse characteristics

calculation.step3: Count houses from 12th to its lord
calculation.step4: Count same distance forward from the lord

example.count: 4 houses from 12th to Jupiter (Pisces to Leo)
example.upapada: 4 houses from Leo = Scorpio is UL

interpretation.UL_sign: Characteristics of spouse's family and background
interpretation.UL_lord: Stability and nature of marital happiness

sequences.note: Dual signs on UL with malefic influence suggests multiple marriages

vivah_saham.description: Sensitive point specifically for marriage timing

calculation.formula: Venus longitude - Sun longitude + Ascendant longitude

vivah_saham.usage: When activated by transit or dasha, indicates marriage timing
